claims.summary: High entropy around 0.90 with rich containment, silt, viscosity, sludge, and density_gradient=0.11 can feel spread thin or over-collapsed if the continuity recap budget treats it as generic high entropy.
Raising CONTINUITY_RECAP_HIGH_TEXTURE_ENTROPY_GATE globally to 0.92 is less precise than density-moderating the rich-viscous case and should not be applied as a blanket live prompt/report retune.
The requested 0.95 entropy and mode_packing=0.30 probes should show bounded flow and liminal pressure/porosity visibility without applying live controller or pressure changes.
